Overall Performance Summary</span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));">&nbsp; &nbsp;2.&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));">Analysis of Anomaly Events&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));">and Causes</span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));">&nbsp; &nbsp;3. Anomaly points, new events</span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));">&nbsp; &nbsp;3. Predictions</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="360" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
